description: Bun webgpu-doe helper API benchmark: Doe helper vs raw bun-webgpu (Dawn)

doe-api.notes: Doe helper API on Doe Bun FFI runtime

bun-webgpu.notes: Raw WebGPU API via bun-webgpu Dawn bindings

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary. Left uses webgpu-doe helpers, right uses raw WebGPU. Both dispatch identical GPU work and readback.
